title: Entomancer

moves.title: Pheromone Spit
effects: If Personal Hive < 3: Gain 1 Personal Hive and Gain 1 Strength; Otherwise: Gain 2 Strength

move_pattern: Starts with Beeeees!, then cycles: Beeeees! → Spear! → Pheromone Spit → repeat
notes: The Entomancer starts combat with 1 stack of Personal Hive. Pheromone Spit has conditional behavior: if Personal Hive is below 3, it gains 1 Personal Hive and 1 Strength; once Personal Hive reaches 3 or more, it gains 2 Strength instead. Over repeated cycles, the Entomancer steadily stacks Strength, hitting harder with Beeeees! and Spear! as the fight goes on.
